# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update/cmake-build-debug
# It was generated by CMake: /snap/clion/250/bin/cmake/linux/x64/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//The filename of the ADU Agent binary.
ADUC_AGENT_FILENAME:STRING=AducIotAgent

//Location where ADU Agent binary is located.
ADUC_AGENT_FOLDER:STRING=/usr/bin

//The ADUC builder name: ADUC-sourced builder will be called DU
ADUC_BUILDER_IDENTIFIER:STRING=DU

//Build documentation files
ADUC_BUILD_DOCUMENTATION:BOOL=OFF

//Build the ADU Agent packages
ADUC_BUILD_PACKAGES:BOOL=OFF

//Build unit tests and mock some functionality
ADUC_BUILD_UNIT_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//The named-pipe for commands IPC.
ADUC_COMMANDS_FIFO_NAME:STRING=/var/lib/adu/du-commands.fifo

//Path for component enumerator extension.
ADUC_COMPONENT_ENUMERATOR_EXTENSION_DIR:STRING=/var/lib/adu/extensions/component_enumerator

//Name of the ADU Agent configuration file.
ADUC_CONF_FILE:STRING=du-config.json

//Path to the ADU configuration file.
ADUC_CONF_FILE_PATH:STRING=/etc/adu/du-config.json

//Path to the configuration folder for the ADU Agent.
ADUC_CONF_FOLDER:STRING=/etc/adu

//Path for content downloader extension.
ADUC_CONTENT_DOWNLOADER_EXTENSION_DIR:STRING=/var/lib/adu/extensions/content_downloader

//The list of content handlers.
ADUC_CONTENT_HANDLERS:STRING=microsoft/swupdate

//Path to the folder containing data file(s) for the ADU Agent.
// e.g. installedcriteria file.
ADUC_DATA_FOLDER:STRING=/var/lib/adu

//The commit strategy for the source update cache.
ADUC_DELTA_DOWNLOAD_HANDLER_SOURCE_UPDATE_CACHE_COMMIT_STRATEGY:STRING=TWO_PHASE_COMMIT

//The base directory to cache source update payloads that delta
// updates are based upon.
ADUC_DELTA_DOWNLOAD_HANDLER_SOURCE_UPDATE_CACHE_DIR:STRING=/var/lib/adu/sdc

//Manufacturer of the device.
ADUC_DEVICEINFO_MANUFACTURER:STRING=Contoso

//Name of the device.
ADUC_DEVICEINFO_MODEL:STRING=Virtual Machine

//Manufacturer of the device
ADUC_DEVICEPROPERTIES_MANUFACTURER:STRING=Contoso

//Model of the device
ADUC_DEVICEPROPERTIES_MODEL:STRING=Video

//Path to the folder containing downloaded update artifacts.
ADUC_DOWNLOADS_FOLDER:STRING=/var/lib/adu/downloads

//Path for the download handler extensions
ADUC_DOWNLOAD_HANDLER_EXTENSION_DIR:STRING=/var/lib/adu/extensions/download_handlers

//Download handler registration file name.
ADUC_DOWNLOAD_HANDLER_REG_FILENAME:STRING=download_handler.json

//File name for the error code definitions
ADUC_ERROR_CODE_DEFS_FILENAME:STRING=result.h

//The folder within Device Update to generate the result.h file
// to
ADUC_ERROR_CODE_DEFS_FOLDER:STRING=/src/inc/aduc/

//Name of the folder that contains the error codes JSON file
ADUC_ERROR_CODE_GENERATOR_JSON_FOLDER:STRING=error_code_generator_defs

//The script file that generates the error code definitions
ADUC_ERROR_CODE_GENERATOR_SCRIPT_FILENAME:STRING=generate_error_code_defs.sh

//Name of the json file that defines the error codes for Device
// Update
ADUC_ERROR_CODE_JSON_FILENAME:STRING=result_codes.json

//Path to the folder where the JSON error code definition file
// lives
ADUC_ERROR_CODE_JSON_FOLDER_PATH:STRING=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update//scripts//error_code_generator_defs

//Path to the folder containing file(s) related to DU Agent extension(s).
ADUC_EXTENSIONS_FOLDER:STRING=/var/lib/adu/extensions

//Path to the folder containing extensions .so file(s).
ADUC_EXTENSIONS_INSTALL_FOLDER:STRING=/var/lib/adu/extensions/sources

//Sub folder for component enumerator extension.
ADUC_EXTENSIONS_SUBDIR_COMPONENT_ENUMERATOR:STRING=component_enumerator

//Sub folder for content downloader extension.
ADUC_EXTENSIONS_SUBDIR_CONTENT_DOWNLOADER:STRING=content_downloader

//Sub folder for download handler extensions.
ADUC_EXTENSIONS_SUBDIR_DOWNLOAD_HANDLERS:STRING=download_handlers

//Sub folder for update content handler extensions.
ADUC_EXTENSIONS_SUBDIR_UPDATE_CONTENT_HANDLERS:STRING=update_content_handlers

//Extension registration file name.
ADUC_EXTENSION_REG_FILENAME:STRING=extension.json

//The group for adu file ownership.
ADUC_FILE_GROUP:STRING=adu

//The user for adu file ownership.
ADUC_FILE_USER:STRING=adu

//Path to the folder to generate the error code file
ADUC_GENERATED_ERROR_CODE_FOLDER_PATH:STRING=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update//src/inc/aduc/

//Path to the ADU Agent home folder.
ADUC_HOME_FOLDER:STRING=/root

//Name of the data file containing InstalledCriteria records.
ADUC_INSTALLEDCRITERIA_FILE:STRING=installedcriteria

//Install the ADU Agent as a daemon
ADUC_INSTALL_DAEMON:BOOL=ON

//The protocol for Azure IotHub SDK communication. Options are
// MQTT, MQTT_over_WebSockets, and IotHub_Protocol_from_Config
ADUC_IOT_HUB_PROTOCOL:STRING=IotHub_Protocol_from_Config

//The logging library to use. Options: xlog zlog
ADUC_LOGGING_LIBRARY:STRING=zlog

//Location where ADU Agent will write logs.
ADUC_LOG_FOLDER:STRING=/var/log/adu

//The platform layer to use. Options: simulator linux
ADUC_PLATFORM_LAYER:STRING=linux

//Register the ADU Agent daemon with the system
ADUC_REGISTER_DAEMON:BOOL=ON

//The folder that holds all of the scripts
ADUC_SCRIPTS_FOLDER:STRING=/scripts/

//Path to the scripts folder within the Device Update project
ADUC_SCRIPTS_FOLDER_PATH:STRING=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update//scripts/

//Path to the folder containing test data file(s) copied from tests/testdata/<testname>
// folders in the source tree.
ADUC_TEST_DATA_FOLDER:STRING=/tmp/adu/testdata

//The path segment in source tree where testdata for various test
// folders will be found.
ADUC_TEST_DATA_PATH_SEGMENT:STRING=testdata

//Trace target dependencies
ADUC_TRACE_TARGET_DEPS:BOOL=OFF

//Sub folder for update content handler extensions.
ADUC_UPDATE_CONTENT_HANDLER_EXTENSION_DIR:STRING=/var/lib/adu/extensions/update_content_handlers

//Content handler registration file name.
ADUC_UPDATE_CONTENT_HANDLER_REG_FILENAME:STRING=content_handler.json

//The build ID part of the semantic version
ADUC_VERSION_BUILD:STRING=

//Path to the file that contains version info for the image or
// device.
ADUC_VERSION_FILE:STRING=/etc/adu-version

//The major part of the semantic version
ADUC_VERSION_MAJOR:STRING=1

//The minor part of the semantic version
ADUC_VERSION_MINOR:STRING=0

//The patch part of the semantic version
ADUC_VERSION_PATCH:STRING=0

//The pre-release part of the semantic version
ADUC_VERSION_PRERELEASE:STRING=

//Treat warnings as errors (-Werror)
ADUC_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS:BOOL=ON

//The effective group name for adu-shell process.
ADUSHELL_EFFECTIVE_GROUP_NAME:STRING=adu

//Filename of adu-shell.
ADUSHELL_FILENAME:STRING=adu-shell

//The absolute path to the adu-shell file path.
ADUSHELL_FILE_PATH:STRING=/usr/lib/adu/adu-shell

//The directory of the adu-shell binary.
ADUSHELL_FOLDER:STRING=/usr/lib/adu

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Debug

//Enable colored diagnostics throughout.
CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-11

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-11

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-11

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-11

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update/cmake-build-debug/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:UNINITIALIZED=/snap/clion/250/bin/ninja/linux/x64/ninja

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// all build types.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_NM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/nm

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJCOPY:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/objcopy

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJDUMP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/objdump

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_HOMEPAGE_URL:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=azure_device_update_client

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ranlib

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_READELF:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/readelf

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/strip

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//File that contains the last completed diagnostic operation's
// id
DIAGNOSTICS_COMPLETED_OPERATION_FILE:STRING=diagnosticsoperationids

//Path to the file that contains the completed diagnostic operation
// ids
DIAGNOSTICS_COMPLETED_OPERATION_FILE_PATH:STRING=/var/lib/adu/diagnosticsoperationids

//Path to the file that contains the configuration information
// for the diagnostics system
DIAGNOSTICS_CONFIG_FILE:STRING=du-diagnostics-config.json

//Path to the diagnostics configuration file.
DIAGNOSTICS_CONFIG_FILE_PATH:STRING=/etc/adu/du-diagnostics-config.json

//The group for do file ownership.
DO_FILE_GROUP:STRING=do

//The user for do file ownership.
DO_FILE_USER:STRING=do

//The flag to turn on/off reporting versions to telemetry
ENABLE_ADU_TELEMETRY_REPORTING:BOOL=ON

//The syslog group.
SYSLOG_FILE_GROUP:STRING=syslog

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for azure_c_shared_utility.
azure_c_shared_utility_DIR:PATH=azure_c_shared_utility_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake
azure_device_update_client_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update/cmake-build-debug

//Value Computed by CMake
azure_device_update_client_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
azure_device_update_client_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update

//Value Computed by CMake
azure_iot_aduc_shell_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update/cmake-build-debug/src/adu-shell

//Value Computed by CMake
azure_iot_aduc_shell_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
azure_iot_aduc_shell_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update/src/adu-shell

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

CMAKE_CACHEFILE_DIR:INTERNAL=/home/thinh/Pictures/sources/iot-hub-device-update/cmake-build-debug
//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=26
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=4

CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/snap/clion/250/bin/cmake/linux/x64/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/snap/clion/250/bin/cmake/linux/x64/bin/cpack

CMAKE_OBJCOPY-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_OBJDUMP
CMAKE_OBJDUMP-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Platform information initialized
CMAKE_PLATFORM_INFO_INITIALIZED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_RANLIB
CMAKE_RANLIB-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_READELF
CMAKE_READELF-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake installation.
CMAKE_ROOT:INTERNAL=/snap/clion/250/bin/cmake/linux/x64/share/cmake-3.26
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STRIP
CMAKE_STRIP-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//uname command
CMAKE_UNAME:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/uname
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//linker supports push/pop state
_CMAKE_LINKER_PUSHPOP_STATE_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=TRUE
//CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX during last run
_GNUInstallDirs_LAST_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/usr/local
